title: Signal K Edge Link Plugin Configuration
description: Unified configuration schema supporting both legacy single-connection and modern multi-connection layouts.

managementApiToken.title: Management API Token
managementApiToken.description: Optional shared secret to protect management API endpoints. Leave empty for open access. Can also be set via SIGNALK_EDGE_LINK_MANAGEMENT_TOKEN environment variable.

secretKey.description: Encryption key. Use a 64-char hex or 44-char base64 key for full 256-bit strength. A 32-char ASCII key works but provides only ~208 bits of entropy unless stretchAsciiKey is enabled.

stretchAsciiKey.description: When true, 32-char ASCII secretKey values are stretched via PBKDF2-SHA256 (600,000 iterations) to a full 256-bit AES key. Hex and base64 keys are unaffected. BOTH ENDS OF THE CONNECTION MUST USE THE SAME SETTING — otherwise authentication will fail and every packet will be dropped.

secretKey.description: Encryption key. Use a 64-char hex or 44-char base64 key for full 256-bit strength. A 32-char ASCII key works but provides only ~208 bits of entropy unless the per-connection stretchAsciiKey option is enabled.

stretchAsciiKey.description: When true, 32-char ASCII secretKey values are stretched via PBKDF2-SHA256 (600,000 iterations) to a full 256-bit AES key. Hex and base64 keys are unaffected. BOTH ENDS OF THE CONNECTION MUST USE THE SAME SETTING — otherwise authentication will fail and every packet will be dropped.
